meaning: n.领路人,导游者,向导,引导者,指南vt.指导,支配,管理,带领,操纵vi.任向导
examples: The guide flashed a light into the cave.
He should have let his instinct guide him.
Josie had offered her services as a guide.
Balloons can work but are time-consuming, and they are slaves to wind and pesky guide wires.
Most stations also have wide ticket gates for wheelchair access or those with guide dogs.
